currency.description: The currency code used to represent all the wallet impact information.

currentValue.description: The current market value of the position.

fxImpact.description: The positive or negative impact on the position's value due to currency rate changes.

totalCost.description: The total cost paid for the position.

unrealizedProfitLoss.description: The unrealized profit & loss for the position. Calculated as currentValue - totalCost.
